summary.allClear: No critical deadlines or open cases right now.
summary.criticalDeadlines: {count, plural, one {# critical deadline} other {# critical deadlines}}
summary.openCases: {count, plural, one {# open case} other {# open cases}}
summary.highRiskTail: — of which {n} carry a high risk score

labels.noQueriesYet: No queries yet. Ask your first via the Legal Assistant.

fristen.emptyWindow: No deadlines in the next {days} days.

activities.empty: No activity in this workspace yet.

vorgaenge.title: Cases
vorgaenge.subtitle: Clarification and task management
vorgaenge.headline: Case overview
vorgaenge.summary: {open} open · {highRisk} with high risk score · end-to-end workflow from intake to dispatch.

create.title: Create case
create.headline: Create new case
create.intro: Upload an incoming document (defect notice, delivery slip, instruction, contract duty). LexBau classifies it via rules; you can adjust category and status at any time after creation.

fristen.title: Deadlines
fristen.subtitle: Central deadline overview
fristen.intro: Sorted by urgency · live from the database
fristen.icalTitle: Deadlines + appointments as an iCal file for Outlook/Apple/Google Calendar

form.taskPlaceholder: e.g. Reply to defect notice — BV-2026-001
form.hint: Category + urgency are derived from the date

bautagebuch.title: Construction Diary
bautagebuch.subtitle: Daily site log
bautagebuch.intro: Every entry is classified automatically and flags legally relevant triggers — instructions, impediments, concerns, defect notices, payment delays.

anzeigen.title: Notices
anzeigen.subtitle: Impediment and concern notices under VOB/B
anzeigen.intro: Notices of impediment (§ 6 (1) VOB/B) and notices of concern (§ 4 (3) VOB/B) — formally demonstrable, with sending workflow, receipt tracking and escalation when acknowledgement is missing.
anzeigen.emptyNoProjects: Create a project first — notices are recorded per project.
anzeigen.emptyHint: Tip: a diary entry categorised as "impediment" or "concern" can be promoted directly to a notice.

stunden.title: Time Tracking
stunden.subtitle: Weekly staff hours
stunden.intro: Daily capture of staff hours. The weekly lock freezes edits after payroll. Plausibility check > 12h/day creates an automatic case.

lockState.openLabel: Week open — edits allowed. Lock after payroll.

warning.over12h: More than 12 hours on a single day — case created automatically.

stunden.empty: No hours recorded for this week.

personal.title: Personnel
personal.intro: Hub for all employee-related tools: time tracking, master data, project assignment. More modules (vacation, training, payroll) to follow.

stunden.title: Time tracking
stunden.desc: Daily personnel hours per employee × project. Week lock after payroll, plausibility check >12 h/day.

mitarbeiter.title: Employees
mitarbeiter.desc: Master data: name, personnel number, wage type, hourly rate, cost centre, trade.

zuordnung.title: Project assignment
zuordnung.desc: Plan-level mapping employee → project with role, period and allocation share. Complements daily hours bookings.

urlaub.title: Vacation & absence
urlaub.desc: Vacation requests, sick notes, leave — balance per employee, approval workflow.

schulung.title: Training & qualifications
schulung.desc: Safety briefings, expert qualifications, certificates with expiry date and reminders.

lohn.title: Payroll preparation
lohn.desc: Prepare weekly hours for payroll/DATEV-Lohn. Per employee × wage type × week.

zuordnung.title: Project assignment
zuordnung.intro: Master/plan basis: which employee works on which project, in what role, with what allocation. Complements the daily hours booking.

form.title: New assignment
form.requirementsHint: At least one active employee and one project must exist before an assignment can be created.

placeholders.rolle: e.g. foreman, site manager, structural engineer

finanzen.title: Finance
finanzen.subtitle: Invoices, accounting, cash flow
finanzen.intro: Incoming and outgoing invoices, e-invoice import, DATEV export and cash-flow planning — every finance workflow in one place.

incoming.title: Incoming invoices
incoming.desc: Invoice-anomaly check: plausibility, price jumps, duplicates, contract matching.

import.title: E-invoice import
import.desc: Import XRechnung, ZUGFeRD, Factur-X. Upload a PDF or XML file — validation runs automatically.

outgoing.title: Outgoing invoices
outgoing.desc: Progress and final invoices with reminder tracking. § 13b reverse charge detected automatically.

datev.title: DATEV export
datev.desc: Booking-batch CSV per DATEV-EXTF spec. Sales, subcontractor incoming, payroll — exportable separately.

liquidity.title: Cash-flow planning
liquidity.desc: Cash-flow forecast from open A/R, subcontractor invoices, payroll. Early warning when balance ≤ 0 within 14 days.

bauabzug.title: Construction tax · § 48a EStG
bauabzug.desc: Quarterly report of the 15% construction-tax retention to the tax office. Aggregated per quarter + CSV template for Mein-ELSTER.

ausgangsrechnungen.title: Outgoing Invoices
ausgangsrechnungen.subtitle: Progress and final invoices
ausgangsrechnungen.intro: Progress and final invoices across all projects. Invoice numbers are sequential workspace-wide and immutable (tax law). Creation happens within the respective project.
ausgangsrechnungen.emptyHint: Invoices are created within projects. Pick a project and use "→ Outgoing invoices" there.

dropzone.label: Drag file here or click to upload

liquiditaet.title: Cash flow planning
liquiditaet.subtitle: Cash flow forecast with early warning
liquiditaet.warning: Early warning: balance projected to drop below 0 within 14 days.

hoaiRechner.title: HOAI Fee Calculator
hoaiRechner.subtitle: Fee calculation per HOAI 2021
hoaiRechner.intro: Fee calculation per HOAI 2021 for building design (§ 35), civil engineering structures (§ 47), structural engineering (§ 51) and building services (§ 56). Linear interpolation between the official fee table values — for project costing, not for litigation-grade fee calculation.
hoaiRechner.tipBefore: Tip: if the project already exists in the system, you can store the HOAI values directly on the project (
hoaiRechner.tipAfter: ) — the fee total then appears automatically in the project list.
hoaiRechner.hint: HOAI values can be stored directly on the project.

rechtAssistent.title: Legal Assistant
rechtAssistent.subtitle: Construction law questions with statutory references
rechtAssistent.intro: Describe your case in plain language — standard cases return the relevant statute, pros/cons and action steps with source references. Custom queries are stored and categorised in the database.
rechtAssistent.noticeBody: Standard-case answers are curated. Free-text queries are currently categorised and stored; the Claude API integration with RAG grounding (VOB/BGB/HOAI/case law) follows in Phase 1.
rechtAssistent.demoBanner: Demo mode: answers from mock scenarios. Live AI follows in Phase 1.

analysen.title: Analyses
analysen.subtitle: Contract, defect notice and instruction analysis
analysen.intro: Document-driven tools: scan contracts, evaluate defect notices, check instructions — all three follow the same pattern (input → analysis → result with statutory reference).

vertrag.title: Contract Scan
vertrag.desc: Pre-signature risk scan: standard-terms clauses, contractual penalties, securities, acceptance rules, unusual quantity clauses.

ruege.title: Defect Notice Analysis
ruege.desc: Review incoming defect notices: formal validity (specificity, deadline, form), substantive merit, suggested reply.
ruege.secondary: Full-text analysis with RAG follows in Phase 1

anordnung.title: Instruction Check
anordnung.desc: Paste an instruction from WhatsApp/email — classification as § 1 III/IV VOB/B, form check, recommendation for site management.
anordnung.secondary: Document instructions in a forensically sound way

vertrag.title: Contract Scan
vertrag.subtitle: Detect risky clauses automatically
vertrag.intro: Paste contract text — automatic scan for typical risk clauses: contractual penalty levels, retention, payment deadlines, terms-and-conditions conflicts, missing reservations. Findings are stored per contract with citation and legal basis.
vertrag.noProjects: Create a project first — contracts are recorded per project.

ausschreibungsAnalyse.title: Tender Analysis
ausschreibungsAnalyse.subtitle: Scan, classify and route public tender documents
ausschreibungsAnalyse.intro: Paste a tender platform URL, paste BVB/contract text, or upload documents. The tool extracts key facts, eligibility and award criteria, risk clauses and deadlines — and returns a bid/no-bid recommendation with reasoning.
ausschreibungsAnalyse.statusBody: Heuristic analysis with platform detection (DTVP, eVergabe, TED, Subreport, Bavaria, NRW) and clause scan. Full-text extraction from PDF/GAEB and Claude-API deep analysis are coming in Phase 1.

ruegeAnalyse.title: Defect Notice Analysis
ruegeAnalyse.subtitle: Review incoming defect notices
ruegeAnalyse.intro: Paste an incoming defect notice or claim from the client — the tool checks formal validity (specificity of the defect, deadline, written form), evaluates substantive merit and suggests a ready-made reply.
ruegeAnalyse.statusBody: Client-side heuristics analysis (deadline detection, keyword match). Full-text analysis with Claude API + RAG over VOB/BGB/case law follows in Phase 1.

anordnung.title: Instruction Check
anordnung.subtitle: Check client communication against VOB/B § 1 (3)/(4)
anordnung.intro: Paste incoming client communication (email, WhatsApp, letter) — the tool checks whether it is a binding instruction within the meaning of § 2 (5) VOB/B and which steps follow. Without an additional-cost notice BEFORE execution, claims are forfeited (BGH VII ZR 201/18).
anordnung.inputPlaceholder: Paste the client's email / message / letter here…
anordnung.minCharsHint: Paste at least 20 characters — analysis runs live.
anordnung.rdgFooter: Information, not legal advice within the meaning of the RDG. The analysis relies on keyword heuristics and is no substitute for legal review.

level.nein: More of a suggestion, no instruction

result.warning: Risk: hidden instruction without additional-cost reservation.

gesetze.title: Laws
gesetze.subtitle: BGB, HOAI 2021, VOB/A/B/C
gesetze.intro: BGB construction-contract law, HOAI 2021 and VOB Parts A/B/C — by paragraph, searchable, with source citations.
gesetze.vobNoticeBody: The VOB is a DIN standard series and is copyright-protected (DIN Media). The texts shown here are paraphrased summaries for reference (fair use). Full texts are integrated via the DIN Media licence (Pro tier).
gesetze.vobNotice: VOB content shown as quotation (§ 51 UrhG); full text via DIN Media licence.

urteile.title: Case-Law Database
urteile.subtitle: Federal Court of Justice (BGH) — VII. ZR + V. ZR
urteile.intro: {total} BGH decisions from construction-relevant senates · live-indexed from the ECLI directory of the Federal Ministry of Justice (BMJ).
urteile.noMatchesFill: Database is empty. Populate with "npm run db:fetch-cases".
urteile.sourceBody: The data is sourced from the official ECLI index of the German Federal Ministry of Justice (rechtsprechung-im-internet.de). Refresh via
urteile.sourceBody2: . The full text of a decision opens at the source URL on click.
urteile.rdgFooter: Information, not legal advice within the meaning of the RDG. The reproduction of leading principles and operative text follows § 5 UrhG (official work).
urteile.search: Search by case ID, title or keyword …
urteile.fulltextHint: Full text available at the Federal Ministry of Justice (BMJ).

hinschg.title: Whistleblower office
hinschg.subtitle: Reports under §§ 12 ff. HinSchG (German Whistleblower Protection Act)
hinschg.intro: Internal reporting office under the German Whistleblower Protection Act. Mandatory from 50 employees. Acknowledgement within 7 days, feedback within 3 months (§ 17 HinSchG).
hinschg.notEnabled: The reporting office is not active for this workspace.
hinschg.notEnabledHint: Activate it in the workspace settings — the public reporting URL becomes available afterwards.
hinschg.publicUrlHint: This URL can be linked publicly or shared by email/notice — no login required.

lizenz.title: License Center
lizenz.subtitle: Workspace tier, user and platform licences
lizenz.intro: Overview of workspace tier, active platform licences, user licences and compliance status. Platform licences from providers (DIN Media / juris / Beck) are managed here — end-user subscriptions remain external.
lizenz.noPlatformLicense: No platform licence on file yet. The app runs in tier-0 mode (paraphrase + deep links to external providers).
lizenz.noPlatformLicenseHint: Once a contract is in place (e.g. DIN Media VOB full text), add an entry to {code} — the UI then switches to full-text display automatically.

external_.anthropicValue: Sign the Anthropic data processing agreement before activating AI responses.
external_.hostingValue: GDPR-compliant · DPA already part of Hetzner ToS.

compliance_.auditNote: Full-text accesses to licensed content are logged for DIN Media audits — once a licence is active.

login.emailIntro: Enter the email address registered in your workspace.
login.helpText: Currently: email-lookup against the workspace. In production replaceable with magic link (Resend) or SSO — just swap the provider configuration in {filePath}.

errors.notFound: This email is not registered in the active workspace. Please contact your workspace admin.

impressum.title: Legal Notice
impressum.description: Provider identification per § 5 DDG (formerly TMG) and § 18 MStV.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.description: Information on the processing of personal data per Art. 13 GDPR.

rdg.title: RDG Notice
rdg.description: Notes on the German Legal Services Act (RDG).

errors.title: Something went wrong.
errors.description: We couldn't load this page. Please try again. If the issue persists, a return to the home page often helps.

notFound.title: Page not found.
notFound.description: The requested address does not exist or was moved.
